data.title: Changan hosts global service competition in Bangkok, with 45 contestants from 19 countries showcasing skills in service, engine, and electrical troubleshooting.
data.description: ChangAn Automobile recently organized its inaugural Global Service Skills Competition in Bangkok, Thailand on August 27-28, 2025. The event featured 45 participants from 19 nations competing in service, engine mechanical troubleshooting, and vehicle electrical system troubleshooting. This competition highlighted ChangAn's professional service expertise and worldwide talent cultivation efforts.

data.title: TotalEnergies CEO to speak at Barclays conference on Sept 4 at 10:20am EDT. Global company in oil and biofuel.
data.description: The Chairman & CEO of TotalEnergies, listed on Paris, London, and New York stock exchanges as TTE, will participate in a virtual fireside chat at the Barclays 39th Annual CEO Energy-Power Conference on September 4th at 10:20am EDT. To watch the live webcast, please click on the provided link. A replay will also be accessible later in the day. TotalEnergies is a leading global energy company involved in the production and distribution of oil and biofuels.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary notes Gen Z's investment in Bitcoin, Ethereum & stocks; admires their ease of access - not seen during his early investment journey.
data.description: Renowned investor Kevin O'Leary shared insights on the investment habits of Gen Z in a recent interview, noting their growing interest in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) in addition to traditional stocks. O'Leary, also known as "Mr. Wonderful," mentioned how younger investors are now utilizing platforms such as Robinhood to purchase these assets alongside stocks, a shift from the norms prevalent when he began investing. He emphasized that Gen Z considers cryptocurrencies as viable investment options akin to stocks or bonds, demonstrating a marked departure from traditional investment strategies. This trend highlights a significant evolution in the investment landscape among younger generations.
